promoted_facts.fact: Renewal fee is $5,000 (subject to CPI adjustment)
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass E / FA Section 2.2(iv), PDF page 59

promoted_facts.fact: Mediation venue is specifically Chicago, IL (not generic 'city of headquarters')
Franchisee waives punitive, exemplary, incidental, indirect, special, and consequential damages
Jury trial waived by both parties
Franchisee must notify franchisor within 30 days of discovering breach as condition precedent to damages claim
No class action arbitration — individual basis only
Failure to open for 5 consecutive days is non-curable termination
Fixed fees may increase annually per CPI-U
